positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial mountain range at twilight. The mountains should be depicted as sharp, overlapping geometric silhouettes in deep sapphire and indigo, contrasting sharply against a gradient sky of vibrant magenta fading into soft teal. Include small, abstract constellations and stylized crescent moons floating between the peaks. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a high-contrast apparel print. Style: Modern flat design, vector illustration aesthetic, clean lines, high contrast, limited color palette (max 5 colors). Inspired by Japanese woodblock woodcuts but rendered digitally and cleanly.
negative: blur, smudge, noise, text, logo, watermark, artifact, poor quality, messy, gradient skin, photographic, realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs
